title: MetaVir - Analysis of viromes
author: Simon Roux
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.d5i84d

steps.title: View taxonomic composition
steps.instruction: The next tab links to the taxonomic composition page. The different taxonomic compositions computed are all displayed through this page. a

steps.title: Navigate Krona piechart
steps.instruction: Krona makes it possible to navigate through the piechart diagram. a

steps.title: Review ratios
steps.instruction: All different ratios are displayed on the right. a

steps.title: Understand taxonomic composition types
steps.instruction: Different types of taxonomic composition are automatically computed. More details on: http://metavir-meb.univ-bpclermont.fr/index.php?page=Taxo

steps.title: Access virome comparison
steps.instruction: A comparison of viromes taxonomic composition is available a

steps.title: Pick composition type
steps.instruction: First pick a type of composition. a

steps.title: Choose visualization type
steps.instruction: Then choose a type of visualization. a

steps.title: Select viromes for comparison
steps.instruction: Then select all the viromes you want to compare. a

steps.title: Check affiliation rates
steps.instruction: Affiliation rates are reminded here. a

steps.title: Display multiple compositions in Krona
steps.instruction: Several compositions can be displayed on the same interactive Krona chart. a

steps.title: Display comparison as heatmap
steps.instruction: The same comparison can be displayed through a heatmap a

steps.title: Interact with heatmap
steps.instruction: This is an interactive heatmap. a

steps.title: Fold/unfold taxonomic groups
steps.instruction: Fold and unfold taxonomic groups with a mouse click. a

steps.title: Adjust font size
steps.instruction: Font size can be modified to fit your screen. a

steps.title: Reorder heatmap columns
steps.instruction: Drag and drop columns to modify their order. a

steps.title: Download heatmap
steps.instruction: The heatmap can be downloaded as a csv file. a

steps.title: Access recruitment plot
steps.instruction: This button links to the recruitment plot. a

description: First tab links to the virome overview page. a
